title: Photonics Integration Senior/Research Engineer (APM), (NSTIC), IME
description:
Job responsibilities

  • Develop and innovate critical photonics/flat optics modules. Drive multi-functional teams to optimize existing process flows and develop new innovative integration solutions to meet potential product requirements and manufacturability.
  • Develop or redefine critical criteria/aspects for optimal design performances and process capability.  Initiate DOE (Design of Experiments) evaluations to characterize process window for new design/product requirements.
  • Pro-active in evaluating and implementing new integration schemes. Establish proof of concept for future tech roadmap.
  • Take on an active attitude to summarize complex problems, explain actions taken to address them with clarity, and align with unit process, design and fabrication teams.
  • Extract and analyse inline, GDS layout, parametric, reliability, and other critical metrics to construct predictive modelling on the photonics/flat optics device performance and specification.
  • Coordinate activities with multi-functional teams to ensure timely wafers handling to meet deadline requirements.
  • Require certain amount of working time in research fab/cleanroom environment for experiment and data collection.
  • Act as subject matter expert for both internal and external stakeholders.  
  • Potential opportunities to work on customer product delivery.

Job requirements:

  • Degree/Master in Electronics Engineering, Microelectronics, Physics, or equivalent.
  • Experiences (3-5 years) in semiconductor industry, preferably in silicon or photonics process integration.
  • MS/PhD candidates with strong hand-on knowledge of semiconductor unit process (etch, litho, deposition) and photonics device physics engineering could be considered too
  • Good critical thinking and problem-solving ability.
  • Able to work in clean room environment.
  • Able to work with cross-functional team, with good communication/presentation skill.
  • Able to work in a fast-paced and collaborative environment.

The above eligibility criteria are not exhaustive. A*STAR may include additional selection criteria based on its prevailing recruitment policies. These policies may be amended from time to time without notice. We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

address.building: AGENCY FOR SCIENCE, TECHNOLOGY AND RESEARCH (A*STAR)

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
